description: A mark or character representing something else; a thing that stands for deeper meaning. 'Relo' names what represents—the visible that points to invisible.
sound_symbolism: The word represents meaning. 'Re' recalls and references, connection to what it represents. Then 'lo' opens to the deeper sense, meaning revealed.
grammatical_notes: Functions as noun: 'lo relo' (the symbol). More abstract than 'phaeli' (sign)—symbols carry layered meaning, cultural depth.

pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Symbols point beyond themselves—the finger pointing at the moon is not the moon.
pillars.art-nouveau-aesthetics: Symbol as art—the visual form carrying meaning, beauty and significance united.
